name: Pearl Global Industries Limited
summary: Pearl Global Industries Limited, together with its subsidiaries, manufactures and exports readymade garments. The company offers knits, woven, and bottoms for men, women, and kids. It also provides supply chain solutions. The company offers its products through retailers in India, the United States, Europe, Bangladesh, Indonesia, Hong Kong, Vietnam, Spain, the United Kingdom, and internationally. In addition, it is involved in the trading of garments through online. The company was formerly known as House of Pearl Fashions Limited. Pearl Global Industries Limited was founded in 1987 and is based in Gurugram, India.
